final:
module dram_cell (
    input clk,
    input we,
    input [3:0] addr,
    input [15:0] data_in,
    output reg [15:0] data_out
);
    reg [15:0] mem_array [0:15]; // 16x16-bit mem_array

    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (we) begin
            mem_array[addr] <= data_in; // Write data to mem_array
        end else begin
            data_out <= mem_array[addr]; // Read data from mem_array
        end
    end
endmodule
